urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
latest.summary: President Donald Trump stated that the US-Saudi nuclear energy deal is contingent upon Saudi Arabia recognizing Israel. He mentioned that the deal is focused solely on non-military use and will not allow for material enrichment.
latest.details: President Donald Trump stated that the US-Saudi nuclear energy deal is contingent upon Saudi Arabia recognizing Israel. He mentioned that the deal is focused solely on non-military use and will not allow for material enrichment. The US Department of Energy indicated that the agreement includes a peaceful nuclear cooperation agreement and a bilateral safeguards agreement. The International Atomic Energy Agency expressed its readiness to implement verification measures related to the agreement.
latest.full_brief: President Donald Trump stated that the US-Saudi nuclear energy deal is contingent upon Saudi Arabia recognizing Israel. He mentioned that the deal is focused solely on non-military use and will not allow for material enrichment. The US Department of Energy indicated that the agreement includes a peaceful nuclear cooperation agreement and a bilateral safeguards agreement. The International Atomic Energy Agency expressed its readiness to implement verification measures related to the agreement.

latest.title: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
latest.summary: Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine's ousted defence minister, has rejected alternative government positions and insists on being reinstated. He has been credited with significant improvements in the Ukrainian army's performance and has led initiatives against corruption.
latest.details: Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine's ousted defence minister, has rejected alternative government positions and insists on being reinstated. He has been credited with significant improvements in the Ukrainian army's performance and has led initiatives against corruption. Following his removal, mass protests erupted, demanding his return to the defence minister role. President Zelensky had previously offered Fedorov the position of deputy prime minister, which he declined.
latest.full_brief: Mykhailo Fedorov, Ukraine's ousted defence minister, has rejected alternative government positions and insists on being reinstated. He has been credited with significant improvements in the Ukrainian army's performance and has led initiatives against corruption. Following his removal, mass protests erupted, demanding his return to the defence minister role. President Zelensky had previously offered Fedorov the position of deputy prime minister, which he declined.

latest.title: Google and Tesla shares plunge as AI spending rattles markets
latest.summary: Shares of Google and Tesla fell sharply as investors reacted to rising expenditures on artificial intelligence. Google's parent company, Alphabet, reported a negative free cash flow for the first time since going public in 2004.
latest.details: Shares of Google and Tesla fell sharply as investors reacted to rising expenditures on artificial intelligence. Google's parent company, Alphabet, reported a negative free cash flow for the first time since going public in 2004. The company plans to spend up to $205 billion this year, primarily on AI projects. Tesla also anticipates spending up to $25 billion on unspecified projects this year.
latest.full_brief: Shares of Google and Tesla fell sharply as investors reacted to rising expenditures on artificial intelligence. Google's parent company, Alphabet, reported a negative free cash flow for the first time since going public in 2004. The company plans to spend up to $205 billion this year, primarily on AI projects. Tesla also anticipates spending up to $25 billion on unspecified projects this year.

latest.title: Teen jailed for exam cheating in Guinea dies after sickle cell complications, father says
latest.summary: Mamadou Djouma Bah, a 17-year-old from Guinea, died after being arrested for exam cheating, and his father blames the authorities for his death. Djouma was convicted of cheating and sentenced to six months in prison, with five months suspended.
latest.details: Mamadou Djouma Bah, a 17-year-old from Guinea, died after being arrested for exam cheating, and his father blames the authorities for his death. Djouma was convicted of cheating and sentenced to six months in prison, with five months suspended. His health deteriorated while in detention, leading to his transfer to a hospital where he later died. Human rights organizations are calling for an independent investigation into the circumstances of his death.
latest.full_brief: Mamadou Djouma Bah, a 17-year-old from Guinea, died after being arrested for exam cheating, and his father blames the authorities for his death. Djouma was convicted of cheating and sentenced to six months in prison, with five months suspended. His health deteriorated while in detention, leading to his transfer to a hospital where he later died. Human rights organizations are calling for an independent investigation into the circumstances of his death.

latest.title: Pauline Hanson blames ‘fake news’ media for her bad press. But serious leaders have to own…
latest.summary: Pauline Hanson, leader of One Nation, has accused the media of misrepresenting her comments and contributing to her negative press. She criticized the integrity of journalists and claimed there is a concerted effort to take her statements out of context.
latest.details: Pauline Hanson, leader of One Nation, has accused the media of misrepresenting her comments and contributing to her negative press. She criticized the integrity of journalists and claimed there is a concerted effort to take her statements out of context. This week, she faced backlash for her remarks on domestic violence and her association with far-right figures. Despite her criticisms, Hanson is positioned to potentially lead the official opposition after the next election.
latest.full_brief: Pauline Hanson, leader of One Nation, has accused the media of misrepresenting her comments and contributing to her negative press. She criticized the integrity of journalists and claimed there is a concerted effort to take her statements out of context. This week, she faced backlash for her remarks on domestic violence and her association with far-right figures. Despite her criticisms, Hanson is positioned to potentially lead the official opposition after the next election.

latest.title: Ghanaians' ICC petition over migrant attacks 'opportunistic', says South Africa
latest.summary: South Africa has dismissed a petition filed at the International Criminal Court (ICC) by two Ghanaians as 'opportunistic'. The petition argues that the violence against foreigners in South Africa could amount to crimes against humanity.
latest.details: South Africa has dismissed a petition filed at the International Criminal Court (ICC) by two Ghanaians as 'opportunistic'. The petition argues that the violence against foreigners in South Africa could amount to crimes against humanity. South Africa's foreign ministry insists that its legal system is capable of handling such matters. Diplomatic tensions between Ghana and South Africa have been escalating due to the situation.
latest.full_brief: South Africa has dismissed a petition filed at the International Criminal Court (ICC) by two Ghanaians as 'opportunistic'. The petition argues that the violence against foreigners in South Africa could amount to crimes against humanity. South Africa's foreign ministry insists that its legal system is capable of handling such matters. Diplomatic tensions between Ghana and South Africa have been escalating due to the situation.

latest.title: Liquor store employee narrowly escapes leopard attack
latest.summary: CCTV footage captured a leopard entering a liquor store in Rajasthan, India, and attacking a salesman. The leopard had previously attacked a cleaning worker inside the store.
latest.details: CCTV footage captured a leopard entering a liquor store in Rajasthan, India, and attacking a salesman. The leopard had previously attacked a cleaning worker inside the store. After the attack, the leopard hid near the counter, allowing both employees to escape. Officials tranquillised and captured the leopard after nearly five hours, and it was later released back into the wild.
latest.full_brief: CCTV footage captured a leopard entering a liquor store in Rajasthan, India, and attacking a salesman. The leopard had previously attacked a cleaning worker inside the store. After the attack, the leopard hid near the counter, allowing both employees to escape. Officials tranquillised and captured the leopard after nearly five hours, and it was later released back into the wild.

latest.title: South Korea woman acquitted of murdering newborn after hospital delivery
latest.summary: A South Korean court has acquitted a woman previously convicted of murdering her newborn after a controversial trial. The case has sparked significant debate regarding the country's abortion laws, which lack clear regulations on late-term procedures.
latest.details: A South Korean court has acquitted a woman previously convicted of murdering her newborn after a controversial trial. The case has sparked significant debate regarding the country's abortion laws, which lack clear regulations on late-term procedures. The woman, known as Kwon, initially sought an abortion at 36 weeks but faced legal action after the baby was born alive. The appeals court's decision highlighted the ambiguity in the legal framework surrounding abortion in South Korea.
latest.full_brief: A South Korean court has acquitted a woman previously convicted of murdering her newborn after a controversial trial. The case has sparked significant debate regarding the country's abortion laws, which lack clear regulations on late-term procedures. The woman, known as Kwon, initially sought an abortion at 36 weeks but faced legal action after the baby was born alive. The appeals court's decision highlighted the ambiguity in the legal framework surrounding abortion in South Korea.

latest.title: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
latest.summary: Patreon is laying off approximately 20 percent of its workforce, which amounts to around 93 employees. CEO Jack Conte stated that the layoffs are not due to a belief that AI replaces humans, but rather because AI has transformed the tech industry.
latest.details: Patreon is laying off approximately 20 percent of its workforce, which amounts to around 93 employees. CEO Jack Conte stated that the layoffs are not due to a belief that AI replaces humans, but rather because AI has transformed the tech industry. Conte emphasized the need for Patreon to embrace AI tools to remain competitive and serve creators effectively. This follows a previous layoff of 17 percent of workers in 2022.
latest.full_brief: Patreon is laying off approximately 20 percent of its workforce, which amounts to around 93 employees. CEO Jack Conte stated that the layoffs are not due to a belief that AI replaces humans, but rather because AI has transformed the tech industry. Conte emphasized the need for Patreon to embrace AI tools to remain competitive and serve creators effectively. This follows a previous layoff of 17 percent of workers in 2022.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
